name: Potato Scones
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the potatoes until tender. Peel them and mash them. This can be done ahead of time, or use leftover potatoes.
2. Add the salt and flour to the mashed potatoes and knead the mixture well.
3. Roll out the dough thinly on a floured board and cut into rounds or triangles.
4. Bake at 500°F for 10 minutes, turning them after 5 minutes.
5. Serve warm with golden syrup or jam.
